title: Vertical Slab
description: You have the ability to create vertical slabs! That's awesome.
body:
This mod let you to create slabs that are vertical, in this way, there are 4 different position for the slab to be placed. So you can do new constructions that before you can't
Here is a gif of this mod working: https://giphy.com/gifs/lBO7JnxJbwbfPLtMUQ
